# NepDate Widget

> The most complete free Nepali date converter and desktop companion for Windows 10 & 11.

NepDate Widget is a lightweight WPF/.NET desktop application that converts Bikram Sambat (BS) dates to Gregorian (AD) dates and AD to BS instantly. It runs from the Windows taskbar as a mini bar showing the current Nepali date, and expands into a full-featured productivity widget.

## Key Features

- **Nepali Date Converter**: Convert BS to AD and AD to BS instantly. Accepts Nepali digits, full month names, and flexible date separators. Also calculates date differences and adds/subtracts days from BS dates.
- **Bikram Sambat Calendar**: Full month grid with tithi, public holidays, fiscal year markers, and both BS and AD dates side by side.
- **Loan EMI Calculator**: Calculate monthly EMIs with a full amortization schedule displayed in Bikram Sambat dates. Includes a multi-period interest calculator.
- **Preeti to Unicode Converter**: Convert Preeti-encoded Nepali text to Unicode and back. Supports bulk conversion.
- **Network Toolkit**: Ping, traceroute, IP scan, Whois, DNS lookup, and My IP - all built in.
- **RunBox Global Launcher**: A system-wide command launcher (Ctrl+Shift+Space) for web searches, calculations, file launching, and custom scripts (PowerShell, Python, batch).
- **Unit Converter**: Convert traditional Nepali land units (Ropani, Bigha, Dhur) and weight units.
- **Notes & Reminders**: Pin notes to specific BS dates. Set recurring reminders with snooze.
- **Document Manager**: Organize and quick-access documents from within the widget.
- **ID Photo**: Crop photos to exact passport/ID print dimensions (Passport/MRP 35×45 mm, Auto Size 25×30 mm, Stamp Size 20×25 mm, US/DV 51×51 mm, or fully custom). Square or circle crop. Export a single photo or tile copies onto A4, 4R, 3R, 5R, or any custom print sheet.
- **Image Tools**: Batch compress (5-level quality slider, metadata stripping, GIF/TIFF/PDF-specific options), resize to exact pixel dimensions, and convert between JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, BMP, TIFF, ICO, TGA, all major RAW formats (ARW, CR2, CR3, DNG, NEF, ORF, RAF, RW2, ERF, PEF, X3F), and PDF. Any combination of all three operations in a single pass.
- **Dual Language UI**: Switch between English and Nepali (नेपाली) instantly - no restart needed.
- **20 Color Themes**: 10 light and 10 dark presets, customizable fonts, rounded or sharp corners, optional transparency.

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Windows 10 (1809+) and Windows 11, 64-bit
- **Framework**: WPF on .NET
- **Install**: [Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9PG97WBJX1NQ) (no admin rights needed) or direct download
- **Offline**: All features work offline except My IP, web searches, and network lookups
- **Privacy**: Zero telemetry, no analytics, no account required
- **Data Storage**: Local JSON files in %LOCALAPPDATA%
- **License**: PolyForm Strict 1.0.0 (free for personal use, source-available)
- **Author**: Raju Prasai (https://github.com/RajuPrasai)

## FAQ

- **Cost**: Free for personal use. Source-available under PolyForm Strict 1.0.0.
- **Windows versions**: Windows 10 (version 1809+) and Windows 11, 64-bit.
- **Offline**: Yes - calendar, date converter, unit converter, text tools, EMI calculator, RunBox, notes, reminders, and documents all work without internet.
- **Bikram Sambat**: Nepal's official calendar system, running about 56-57 years ahead of the Gregorian calendar. Used in government documents, banks, and official records.
- **How to convert BS to AD**: Open the Date tab, select BS → AD, type the Bikram Sambat date. The Gregorian equivalent appears instantly.
- **How to convert AD to BS**: Open the Date tab, select AD → BS, type the Gregorian date. The Bikram Sambat equivalent appears instantly.
- **Performance**: Lightweight WPF app - negligible CPU when idle. Background work limited to a low-frequency reminder timer.
- **Data privacy**: Zero telemetry, no analytics, no account. All data stays in local JSON files.
- **Customization**: 20 color presets, 20 font choices, rounded/sharp corners, transparency, per-element calendar toggles.
